command:
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'

echo '=== AGENTS DIR CONTENTS ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
for agent in sakura remy megabyte larry sentinel chatgpt claude; do
    echo "--- $agent ---"
    ls /home/jose/moreno-ai/agents/$agent/ 2>/dev/null
done
' 2>&1

echo '=== NATS ON vm-ecosystem - find service ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.203 '
docker ps 2>/dev/null | head -10
docker network ls 2>/dev/null | head -5
docker inspect moreno-nats 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)[0]
nc=d.get("NetworkSettings",{})
print("IP:",nc.get("IPAddress"))
for net,info in nc.get("Networks",{}).items():
    print(f"  net={net} ip={info.get("IPAddress","")}")
ports=nc.get("Ports",{})
for p,binds in ports.items():
    if binds:
        for b in binds:
            print(f"  port={p} -> {b.get("HostIp","")}:{b.get("HostPort","")}")
" 2>/dev/null
' 2>&1

echo '=== NATS REACHABILITY FROM vm-memory ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=8 -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205 '
curl -s --max-time 3 http://192.168.0.203:8222/varz 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print("NATS v="+d.get("version","?"),"uptime="+d.get("uptime","?"),"subs="+str(d.get("subscriptions",0)))
" 2>/dev/null || echo "NATS at .203:8222 not reachable from vm-memory"

curl -s --max-time 3 http://192.168.0.203:4222 2>/dev/null && echo "NATS :4222 open" || echo "NATS :4222 not reachable"
' 2>&1

echo DONE_1997
